arts.sum: Erik ten Hag wanted Manchester United to sign a different centre-forward than Rasmus Hojlund during his second summer transfer window since arriving at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro tells Rio Ferdinand why he was nicknamed after one of his old Man Utd team-mates
arts.sum: Leny Yoro arrived at Manchester United in a £52million deal last summer, but he was already influenced by the Old Trafford club thanks to his childhood nickname

arts.sum: Manchester United defender Leny Yoro has opened up on life at Old Trafford after joining the Red Devils in a big-money transfer from Lille back in the summer window

arts.ttl: Revealed: How Sir Dave Brailsford plans to transform Man United into title-winners in his Mission 21 plan - and the major recruitment change
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: Manchester United have launched 'Mission 21' - their plan to capture a 21st Premier League title within the next three years via the best young talent on the planet.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's No.9 answer? Harry Kane's release clause revealed
arts.sum: Harry Kane's contract at Bayern Munich surprisingly contains a release clause, according to German media. Intriguingly, BILD now reports that Musiala will not be the first Bayern player in recent memory - or potentially ever - with a release clause because record signing Harry Kane has had one since he joined the club for €100 million in 2023.
